questions: Table tennis ar ping pong ki same?
Best table tennis players ke ke?
Ping pong khelte ki ki lagbe?
answers: Table tennis, also known as ping pong, is a fast-paced indoor sport where players hit a lightweight ball back and forth across a net on a table. It requires quick reflexes, spin techniques, and strategic placement.
Ping pong khelte ekta table, net, paddle (bat), ar ball lagbe. Game ta 11 points e hoy, ar 2 points er lead lagbe jittar jonno.
Table tennis is one of the most popular sports worldwide, especially in China. Legends like Ma Long, Fan Zhendong, and Jan-Ove Waldner have dominated the sport over the years.
Table tennis rules are simple — serve diagonally, let the ball bounce once on each side, and rally until someone misses. Matches are usually best of 5 or 7 games, each played to 11 points.
